page_metadata.biotools__summary: Database of Antimicrobial Activity and Structure of Peptides (DBAASP)  is the manually-curated database. It has been developed to provide the information and analytical resources to the  scientific community in order to develop antimicrobial compounds with the high therapeutic index.
